title: The Creation: Mireuk and Seokga
description: The Korean creation myth: Mireuk (Maitreya) creates the world, but the trickster Seokga steals it through a flower-growing contest.
introduction: The Korean creation myth: Mireuk (Maitreya) creates the world, but the trickster Seokga steals it through a flower-growing contest.

translation.original_text: In the beginning, Mireuk separated heaven and earth. He placed four copper pillars at the four corners.
